title: Geometry, resistance and stability of the Delft systematic yacht hull series
authors: J. Gerritsma; R. Onnink; A. Versluis
source_status: public bibliographic source; numeric extraction required
notes: Original DSYHS publication. Abstract states resistance and stability were determined for 22 systematically varied yacht hull forms. Numeric tables must be extracted or imported before automated validation.

title: Data underlying the publication: Data-Driven Models for Yacht Hull Resistance Optimization: Exploring Geometric Parameters Beyond the Boundaries of the Delft Systematic Yacht Hull Series
authors: J. M. Walker; A. Coraddu; Luca Oneto
source_status: public dataset catalog; dataset import required
notes: Dataset description states it includes hydrodynamic resistance data, geometric descriptors, hydrostatics, operating conditions such as Froude number, and resistance results.

title: Delft Systematic Yacht Hull Series RAW coefficients data
source_status: public dataset catalog; optional future module
notes: Useful later for added resistance in waves. Not used yet for calm-water validation.
